rationale: The war continues as the dominant background reality; the confirmed US-Iran ceasefire announcement is a qualitative step that could further divert US attention from Ukraine, but no direct change to Ukrainian battlefield or aid situation yet.

top_events.title: US-Iran ceasefire officially announced; peace deal signing Friday
top_events.summary: The confirmed ceasefire is a qualitative step beyond prior rhetoric — US diplomatic focus on Iran may further reduce attention and resources available for Ukraine support. No direct aid cut confirmed yet.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war continues; Russian families use AI to 'resurrect' war dead
top_events.summary: Active combat continues without qualitative change — the AI story reflects the scale of Russian casualties but does not alter the military situation for Ukrainians.

top_events.title: Lebanese remain sceptical of US-Iran ceasefire
top_events.summary: Regional scepticism about the US-Iran deal's durability is noted — for Ukraine, a fragile or failed deal could redirect US attention back, but this remains speculative.
